name: npcink/npcink-toolbox
description: WordPress AI toolbox plugin for Cloud-managed web search, Cloud-managed image-source candidates, Qdrant vector search, and fixed-flow operator actions.

scripts.eval:summary:export: WP_PATH="${WP_PATH:-/Users/muze/Local Sites/magick-ai/app/public}"; WP_CLI_BIN="${WP_CLI_BIN:-/tmp/wp-cli.phar}"; WP_CLI_PHP="${WP_CLI_PHP:-$HOME/Library/Application Support/Local/lightning-services/php-8.5.3+1/bin/darwin-arm64/bin/php}"; SOCKET="${WP_DB_SOCKET:-$HOME/Library/Application Support/Local/run/NPb24Zg9g/mysql/mysqld.sock}"; SUMMARY_EVAL_AUTHOR="${SUMMARY_EVAL_AUTHOR:-Muze}"; SUMMARY_EVAL_LIMIT="${SUMMARY_EVAL_LIMIT:-50}"; SUMMARY_EVAL_OUTPUT="${SUMMARY_EVAL_OUTPUT:-tests/summary-eval/generated/muze-source-samples.json}"; mkdir -p "$(dirname "$SUMMARY_EVAL_OUTPUT")"; "$WP_CLI_PHP" -d display_errors=0 -d error_reporting=8191 -d mysqli.default_socket="$SOCKET" "$WP_CLI_BIN" --path="$WP_PATH" --no-color eval-file tests/summary-eval/export-wp-samples.php -- "author=$SUMMARY_EVAL_AUTHOR" "limit=$SUMMARY_EVAL_LIMIT" "output=$SUMMARY_EVAL_OUTPUT"
scripts.eval:summary:generate: WP_PATH="${WP_PATH:-/Users/muze/Local Sites/magick-ai/app/public}"; WP_CLI_BIN="${WP_CLI_BIN:-/tmp/wp-cli.phar}"; WP_CLI_PHP="${WP_CLI_PHP:-$HOME/Library/Application Support/Local/lightning-services/php-8.5.3+1/bin/darwin-arm64/bin/php}"; SOCKET="${WP_DB_SOCKET:-$HOME/Library/Application Support/Local/run/NPb24Zg9g/mysql/mysqld.sock}"; SUMMARY_EVAL_INPUT="${SUMMARY_EVAL_INPUT:-tests/summary-eval/generated/muze-source-samples.json}"; SUMMARY_EVAL_OUTPUT="${SUMMARY_EVAL_OUTPUT:-tests/summary-eval/generated/muze-candidates.json}"; SUMMARY_EVAL_GENERATE_LIMIT="${SUMMARY_EVAL_GENERATE_LIMIT:-10}"; SUMMARY_EVAL_RETRY="${SUMMARY_EVAL_RETRY:-3}"; SUMMARY_EVAL_RETRY_SLEEP="${SUMMARY_EVAL_RETRY_SLEEP:-8}"; SUMMARY_EVAL_SAMPLE_SLEEP="${SUMMARY_EVAL_SAMPLE_SLEEP:-2}"; mkdir -p "$(dirname "$SUMMARY_EVAL_OUTPUT")"; "$WP_CLI_PHP" -d display_errors=0 -d error_reporting=8191 -d mysqli.default_socket="$SOCKET" "$WP_CLI_BIN" --path="$WP_PATH" --no-color eval-file tests/summary-eval/generate-wp-candidates.php -- "input=$SUMMARY_EVAL_INPUT" "output=$SUMMARY_EVAL_OUTPUT" "limit=$SUMMARY_EVAL_GENERATE_LIMIT" "retries=$SUMMARY_EVAL_RETRY" "retry_sleep=$SUMMARY_EVAL_RETRY_SLEEP" "sample_sleep=$SUMMARY_EVAL_SAMPLE_SLEEP"
scripts.package:release: rm -rf build/npcink-toolbox build/npcink-toolbox.zip && mkdir -p build && rsync -a --delete --exclude-from=.distignore ./ build/npcink-toolbox/ && cd build && zip -qr npcink-toolbox.zip npcink-toolbox
scripts.plugin-check:release: WP_PATH="${WP_PATH:-/Users/muze/Local Sites/magick-ai/app/public}"; WP_CLI_BIN="${WP_CLI_BIN:-/tmp/wp-cli.phar}"; WP_CLI_PHP="${WP_CLI_PHP:-$HOME/Library/Application Support/Local/lightning-services/php-8.5.3+1/bin/darwin-arm64/bin/php}"; SOCKET="${WP_DB_SOCKET:-$HOME/Library/Application Support/Local/run/NPb24Zg9g/mysql/mysqld.sock}"; "$WP_CLI_PHP" -d display_errors=0 -d error_reporting=8191 -d mysqli.default_socket="$SOCKET" "$WP_CLI_BIN" --path="$WP_PATH" --no-color plugin check npcink-toolbox --format=table --exclude-directories=tests,.git,vendor,node_modules,build,docs,scripts --exclude-files=.gitignore,.distignore,AGENTS.md,README.md,composer.json,composer.lock,phpcs.xml,phpcs.xml.dist,phpstan.neon,phpstan.neon.dist
